activities.title: Aerospace Industry Night
activities.text: AESA x MAMEC's annual networking night connects students with aerospace companies, Q&A panel guests, internship pathways, and industry representatives.

activities.title: Campus Fest Membership Drive
activities.text: AESA meets new and returning students on Bowen Street, introducing membership, events, merchandise, and committee opportunities.

activities.title: Industry Networking
activities.text: Events are built around communication skills, professional development, and helping students build contacts with industry.

activities.title: Student Project Pathways
activities.text: AESA connects students with aerospace-adjacent initiatives including space sector, rover, rocketry, UAV, and research communities.

activities.title: AIAA RMIT Student Branch
activities.text: AESA represents the AIAA RMIT University Student Branch and links students with broader aerospace professional networks.
